summary: Comprehensive WebSocket feature testing completed. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend WebSocket integration verified: connection indicator shows green with 'Онлайн' text, sound toggle button present, toast notifications for new orders/staff calls, and Orders page auto-refreshes via WS events.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - returns healthy status
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin/220066 - returns access_token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials - returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token - returns user data
Backend: GET /api/restaurants - returns list of restaurants
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id} - returns restaurant details
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/categories - works
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/menu-items - works
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/orders - works
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/staff-calls - works
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/tables - works
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/labels - works
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/settings - works
Backend: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/analytics - works
Backend: GET /api/public/menu/{regular_table} - works
Backend: GET /api/public/menu/{preorder_table} - is_preorder=true
Backend: GET /api/public/menu/INVALID - returns 404
Backend: WS /api/ws/{restaurant_id} without token - returns close code 4001
Backend: WS /api/ws/{restaurant_id} with invalid token - returns close code 4001
Backend: WS /api/ws/{restaurant_id} with valid token - connects and ping/pong works
Backend: WS broadcast on new order - new_order event sent to connected clients
Backend: WS broadcast on staff call - new_staff_call event sent to connected clients
Backend: POST /api/public/orders - creates order with menu_item_id
Backend: POST /api/public/orders (preorder) - creates preorder correctly
Backend: POST /api/public/staff-calls - creates staff call
Frontend: Login page with Russian placeholders (Введите логин, Введите пароль)
Frontend: Login with admin/220066 - works, redirects to admin
Frontend: WS status indicator shows green dot (bg-green-500) when connected
Frontend: 'Онлайн' text displayed next to WS indicator
Frontend: Sound toggle button present in sidebar (data-testid='toggle-sound-sidebar')
Frontend: Orders page loads with 3 tabs (Заказы, Предзаказы, Вызовы)
Frontend: Orders page auto-refreshes when WS new_order event received (count increased)
Frontend: Toast notification appears for new order (Новый заказ — Стол #1)
Frontend: Toast notification appears for staff call (Вызов — Стол #1)
seed_data_creation: Test orders and staff calls created during WebSocket broadcast testing via public API endpoints.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket feature fully implemented and tested. Backend WS endpoint at /api/ws/{restaurant_id}?token={jwt} accepts JWT via query param, responds to 'ping' with {'type':'pong'}, broadcasts 'new_order' and 'new_staff_call' events when orders/calls created via public API. Frontend has global WS connection in AdminLayout with toast notifications, sound alerts, and connection indicator in sidebar. OrdersPage listens for CustomEvents and auto-refreshes. All API endpoints continue to work (regression passed).

backend_features_verified: ConnectionManager class manages WS connections per restaurant
WS endpoint /api/ws/{restaurant_id} with JWT auth via query param
Connection without token closes with code 4001
Connection with invalid token closes with code 4001
Valid connection accepts and responds to ping with pong
Broadcast method sends events to all connected clients for restaurant
frontend_features_verified: useWebSocket hook connects with restaurantId and token
Ping every 30s to keep connection alive
AdminLayout handles WS messages, plays sound, shows toast
Connection indicator in sidebar (green = connected, red = disconnected)
Sound toggle button persists preference in localStorage
OrdersPage listens for ws:new_order and ws:new_staff_call CustomEvents
Auto-refresh of order/call list on WS event
